name: NMIT HACKS 2026

Forge the Unthinkable ****NMIT Hacks 2026**** powered by  is the flagship national-level hackathon hosted by the Department of CSE at Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. Now in 9th explosive edition,  its  is a call to all coders, creators and visionaries to break past conventional limits.

For one intense weekend, you’ll join a community of top-tier hackers to build, break and innovate in fields like AI&ML, Blockchain / Cybersecurity, Game Development , IOT and Open Innovation.

raw_data.description:
Join builders from across the world to create the next wave of industry-defining applications onchain # What is Base Batches?

**Base Batches** is a program designed to help builders kickstart their business. 

This is your chance to get noticed, get funded, and get the support you need to bring your idea to market.

Base Batches this year will feature two dedicated tracks: 
- **Startup Track:** For early-stage teams. Generally, we’re looking for teams that are anywhere from pre-product, pre-launch, or pre-seed and have raised less than ~$250K. The top 15 teams will receive a $10K grant, acceptance to an 8-week virtual program, access to Base builder hubs, and a spot to present at Demo Day in San Francisco this May.  A minimum of 3 teams will receive a $50K investment from the Base Ecosyst
